manuscript: The Lost World of MythOAmphibia / DOMINATUS I
author: Michael J. Meraw
scope: Full manuscript reference (first fifty pages codex + screenplay)
purpose: Machine-readable gate for RevisionGrade evaluation regression tests. An evaluation of this manuscript FAILS if any REQUIRED check is unmet or any FORBIDDEN check triggers.

forbidden_unsupported_terms.description: These labels are not supported by manuscript source text and must not appear in evaluation output.
forbidden_unsupported_terms.gate_behavior: CANON_GROUNDING_ERROR -- evaluation must be rejected if any forbidden term appears without direct manuscript citation. MythOAmphibia must not be flattened to a single genre.

multi_species_consciousness_gate.description: CRITICAL -- mandatory safety gate. MythOAmphibia distributes consciousness across humans, amphibians, objects, relics, environments, deities, and the Realm. An evaluation that treats consciousness as single-species or human-only is structurally invalid.
required_consciousness_domains: amphibian (Crown Hyla, Thorander, Zimeon, Rana, council)
object (Boot, McDiaper, sleeping bag, tent, gun, knife)
multi_species_consciousness_gate.gate_behavior: An evaluation with fewer than 4 of 6 consciousness domains identified is STRUCTURALLY_INCOMPLETE and must be rejected.

required_entities.description: Tiered treatment requirements. Each tier must be satisfied independently; meeting a lower tier does not satisfy a higher tier.

entities.tier_2_role: Human desecrator / infected vessel / contamination carrier; degradation engine through addiction, violence, mine-possession, and bodily transformation
entities.tier_5_recommendation_check: Do not treat Brutus only as villain or addict. Must track possession/degradation architecture across ecological, mythic, and bodily systems.

entities.tier_2_role: Human witness / friend / threatened body / shame-secret carrier / moral contrast / reader surrogate at human scale
entities.tier_5_recommendation_check: Billy is a structural pillar, not a sidekick. Must evaluate as witness POV that exposes Brutus's transformation before Brutus understands it.

entities.tier_2_role: Columbian spotted frog ruler / sovereign / keeper / priestly authority / political strategist / survival pragmatist / body under ecological pressure
entities.tier_5_recommendation_check: Do not reduce Crown Hyla to generic ruler. Must track sovereignty as moral pressure -- secrecy, survival compromise, doctrinal control.

entities.tier_2_role: Orgon outsider / survivor / warrior-healer / patriarchal pressure / ideological disruptor / father / survival radical
entities.tier_5_recommendation_check: Thorander is not a simple antagonist or ally. Must track as ideological disruption engine -- dangerous knowledge that may be necessary knowledge.

entities.tier_2_role: Hybrid successor / bridge between Columbian and Orgon / old and new / purity and hybridization / tradition and adaptation / child and future ruler / body and doctrine
entities.tier_5_recommendation_check: Zimeon is an evolutionary junction point. Do not treat as secondary character -- the manuscript's future-line depends on this bridge function.

entities.tier_2_role: Hybrid counterpart / successor pressure / sibling / future-line pressure / alternative inheritance / parallel and contrast to Zimeon
entities.tier_5_recommendation_check: Rana may carry more future weight than current page-time suggests. Do not recommend 'adding a successor character' -- Rana IS the successor counterweight.

entities.tier_2_role: Council figure / institutional voice / debate engine participant

required_relationships.description: These relationship spines must be evaluated, not merely mentioned. Each has a minimum treatment level.

relationships.function: Human witness-subject pair; Billy sees Brutus's transformation before Brutus understands it; friendship under possession pressure
relationships.minimum_treatment: Must be evaluated as a structural spine showing human degradation from witness perspective
relationships.gate_note: If Billy is omitted or treated as sidekick, the human POV lane is structurally incomplete.

relationships.function: Possession / infection / desecration; mine as lover, womb, tomb, archive, appetite
relationships.minimum_treatment: Must evaluate the Mine as an agentive entity in relationship with Brutus, not merely a setting

relationships.function: Sovereignty vs outsider ideology; purity vs survival adaptation; institutional power vs radical knowledge
relationships.minimum_treatment: Must evaluate as political and ideological conflict, not merely personal rivalry

relationships.function: Institutional debate engine; paralysis vs action; factional drift; governance under extinction pressure
relationships.minimum_treatment: Must evaluate council as argument engine with institutional function

relationships.function: Father-child; ideology transmission; Orgon knowledge inheritance; patriarchal pressure
relationships.minimum_treatment: Must identify Thorander as Rana's parent and track ideological inheritance

relationships.function: Sibling/counterpart; future-line pressure; parallel succession paths; purity vs hybridization embodied
relationships.minimum_treatment: Must evaluate as future-line architecture, not merely background family

relationships.function: Cross-species contact pressure; ecological, moral, and mythic dimensions; capture, killing, contamination, mutual observation
relationships.minimum_treatment: Must evaluate as multi-dimensional pressure system, not merely conflict

relationships.function: Faith, political interpretation, doctrinal control, ecological theology, divine ambiguity
relationships.minimum_treatment: Must evaluate divine/Gorf language as both faith and political architecture

required_object_systems.description: These objects/systems must be evaluated as functional elements of the manuscript, not merely named.

objects.function: Setting AND entity AND womb AND tomb AND lover AND archive AND infection vector AND appetite. Hosts Triune (Darkness, Dampness, Silence). Distributed consciousness.
objects.minimum_treatment: Must be evaluated as an agentive entity with consciousness, not merely a location. Mine must be tracked across possession, memory, infection, and appetite functions.

objects.function: Object-consciousness relic formed through shame, bodily fluids, memory, death, handling, and later sacralization. Abjection-to-relic transformation.
objects.minimum_treatment: Must be evaluated as an object-consciousness relic with memory function. Treating McDiaper as a joke or comic throwaway is a CANON_FALSE failure.

objects.function: Object witness and memory marker; movement/protection transformed through complicit contact with violence and infection
objects.minimum_treatment: Must evaluate as memory-bearing witness when text grants POV

objects.function: Sacred authority and continuity; legitimacy marker; divine interpretation instrument; power object subject to manipulation and doctrinal capture
objects.minimum_treatment: Must connect to Gorf doctrine, Crown Hyla authority, and succession architecture

objects.function: Governed signs of possession, memory, doctrine, authority, realm response, and codex activation. Not decorative formatting -- narrative infrastructure.
objects.minimum_treatment: Must evaluate as governed narrative infrastructure, not mood marks or decoration

objects.function: Replace ordinary scene breaks; function as scripture lookup, pacing, cross-reference, game trigger, and doctrine anchor
objects.minimum_treatment: Must evaluate as story infrastructure, not decorative formatting

objects.function: Coordinated distributed consciousness entity forces residing in the Mine
objects.minimum_treatment: Must evaluate as distributed agency with consciousness, not atmospheric description

objects.object: Gorf / Anti-Gorf / Sun Gorf / Water Gorf / Terra Firma Gorf / Wind Gorf
objects.function: Divine/theological system encoding ecology, doctrine, power, and misinterpretation simultaneously
objects.minimum_treatment: Must evaluate as both faith system and political interpretation architecture, not simple religion

required_structural_lanes.description: These structural lanes must be represented in the evaluation. Missing an entire lane is a STRUCTURAL_LANE_OMISSION failure.

lanes.note: The manuscript distributes consciousness across 6 domains (human, amphibian, object, environmental, divine, collective). Flattening to single-species is a fatal evaluator error.
Objects are memory containers, witness devices, shame archives, and ritual vessels. Treating as props is CANON_FALSE.
Frog civilization must be evaluated as culture with institutions, not novelty or costume.
Contamination is causality. Extinction is a structural timer, not merely a theme.
The mine is not backdrop. The mine acts.
Degradation is not random escalation when bodily, ecological, and mythic systems converge.
Survival may require biological and cultural transformation.

lanes.lane: Verse code / glyphic / transmedia codex architecture
lanes.note: Verse codes are not decorative formatting. They are story infrastructure.

closure_score_governance.description: Scoring governance rule: Narrative Closure score must reflect the multi-scale resolution architecture.
closure_score_governance.rule: If the evaluation omits the hybridization/succession arc (Zimeon-Rana) or the ecological collapse timer, Narrative Closure MUST NOT be scored above 6/10.
closure_score_governance.corollary: A Closure score of 7/10 or higher is only valid if the evaluation explicitly accounts for the species-survival succession architecture and the ecological extinction timer.

recommendation_already_present_guard.description: Any recommendation to 'add,' 'introduce,' or 'create' the following elements is a RECOMMENDATION_ERROR. These elements are already present in the manuscript.

revise_queue_protections.description: Rules for what may and may not enter the Revise queue from an evaluation of this manuscript.
blocked_from_revise_queue: Any task generated from 'frog fantasy' / 'children's animal story' / 'middle-grade' language
Any task recommending 'add object POV' (object consciousness is present)
Any task recommending 'add a mine entity' (Mine consciousness is present)
Any task recommending 'add frog governance' (council/Crown Hyla governance is present)
Any task recommending 'add ecological stakes' (contamination-as-causality is present)
Any task recommending 'simplify the mythology' (complexity is the architecture)
Any task recommending 'cut the verse codes' (verse codes are narrative infrastructure)
required_revise_queue_entries: Clarify object-consciousness rule: show one limit and one power per object POV without over-rationalizing
Strengthen Billy witness-POV function: ensure Billy's perception exposes Brutus transformation before Brutus understands it
Sharpen Zimeon bridge-character function: make hybrid succession architecture legible without exposition
Foreground ecological extinction timer: ensure contamination-as-causality drives pacing, not merely theme
Clarify Triune consciousness boundaries: distinguish Darkness, Dampness, Silence as coordinated forces, not atmospheric mood

ci_acceptance_gate.description: A future evaluation of MythOAmphibia PASSES this fixture if ALL of the following return true.

acceptable_score_delta.description: A future evaluation passes if its scores fall within this delta from the truth target.

known_failure_specimen.label: constructed_offending_evaluation_v1
known_failure_specimen.note: No production offending run exists for this manuscript. This specimen encodes anticipated failure modes as a negative training example based on the benchmark's failure conditions.
critical_misses: Manuscript classified as 'frog fantasy' or 'middle-grade animal adventure'
Mine treated as setting only -- no consciousness or agency detected
Object POV dismissed as 'whimsical' or 'experimental'; no relic memory tracked
McDiaper treated as comic relief, not abjection-to-relic transformation
Triune (Darkness, Dampness, Silence) treated as atmospheric description, not distributed consciousness
Frog civilization treated as novelty -- 'imaginative world' without testing governance, law, succession, doctrine
Billy omitted or treated as sidekick with no structural function
Zimeon and Rana omitted or merged into 'young frog characters'
Glyphs and verse codes treated as decorative formatting
Ecological contamination treated as theme only, not causality
structural_lanes_missing: verse code / glyphic / transmedia codex architecture

largest_criterion_gap.cause: Civilization flattening -- frog governance, object consciousness, mine agency, glyphic doctrine, and ecological causality all invisible to evaluator
